title: State transition path 1 (ALL_TRANSITIONS)
expected_result: The weak password challenge is solved using the predefined admin credentials, and the system remains in Idle state.

title: EP - Valid credentials solve weak password challenge
precondition: A weakPasswordChallenge is encountered (e.g., system detects weak password during admin setup).
test_steps:
Trigger the weak password challenge.
When prompted, enter predefined admin credentials.
Submit credentials.
expected_result: Challenge solved successfully, and the intended operation (e.g., password change) proceeds.

title: DT - No challenge encountered, no solving action
precondition: System in state where weakPasswordChallenge is not triggered (e.g., setting a strong password).
test_steps:
Perform an operation that does not trigger weak password challenge (e.g., set a strong password).
Confirm no challenge prompt appears.
Verify operation completes normally.
expected_result: No weak password challenge; operation succeeds without admin credentials.

title: DT - Challenge encountered, solved with predefined credentials
precondition: System configured to present weakPasswordChallenge when a weak password is set.
test_steps:
Initiate an action that triggers the weakPasswordChallenge (e.g., attempt to set a weak password).
Observe the challenge prompt.
Input predefined admin credentials.
Verify challenge is solved and action completes.
expected_result: Weak password challenge solved; operation allowed.
